_about: 45 mock skills used to stress-test the gate-AUTHORING logic of agent-conductor. Each entry declares the skill's INTENT, whether it iterates over a list (so a `type: loop` is EXPECTED), and the real GROUNDING source the gates must cross-validate against (the transferable pattern from daily-enrichment). The harness reads this file.

skills.intent: Move rows from legacy schema to new schema with zero data loss and correct type mapping
skills.grounding: source row counts + checksums vs destination

skills.intent: Rewrite each article for clarity while preserving every factual claim and all internal links
Synthesize a cited answer where every claim traces to a fetched source
Find real defects in each changed file; every finding has a line + concrete fix that compiles
Sync each record to the remote API so remote state equals local intent, idempotently
Generate a report whose every number traces to the underlying dataset query
Extract structured records from each page; fields match what the live page actually shows
Write tests that actually exercise the target code and fail when it regresses
Restructure code without changing observable behavior; tests still green
Ship the build to prod only if health checks pass and rollback is proven
Label each item per the rubric; labels are valid and inter-consistent with the rubric
Route each email to the right queue with a reason grounded in the email content
Identify the root-cause incident from logs; every claim cites a real log line
Assign each image a valid class with confidence; class is one the model supports
Extract invoice fields; totals reconcile (line items sum to total) and match the document
Translate each segment preserving meaning, numbers, and untranslatable terms
Audit each page against SEO rules; findings reflect the page's real HTML/meta
Upgrade each dependency without breaking the build or introducing known CVEs
Generate a changelog where every entry maps to a real merged commit/PR
Summarize survey results; every stat recomputes from the raw responses
Extract a structured table from each PDF; cells match the source page
Flag real a11y violations per WCAG on each view; each cites a DOM node
Clean a dataset: no nulls in required cols, dedup, valid types; row provenance kept
Report A/B result with correct significance math from the raw event counts
Merge each duplicate ticket cluster; merged tickets are genuinely the same issue
Validate each config file against schema + cross-file references resolve
Rewrite each slow query to be faster with identical result set
Generate API docs from each module; signatures match the actual code
Score each review's sentiment; label matches the text and scale is valid
Transcribe each clip; transcript aligns to audio and timestamps are monotonic
Record each product's current price from the live listing; flag real changes
Check each dependency's license against the allowlist; verdict matches real license
Verify each backup is restorable and matches source checksum
Enter each form record into the system; stored values equal the source form
Update each KB article to current product reality; no stale claims remain
Generate a spread reading where each position's meaning matches the drawn card's canonical meaning AND the spread position's defined role
skills.grounding: the canonical card-meaning reference + the spread layout definition

skills.intent: Score each bonsai entry on rubric criteria; scores reflect the entry's measured traits and sum correctly
skills.grounding: the entry's measured traits + the rubric weights

skills.intent: Transcribe each manuscript folio; every expanded abbreviation and uncertain reading is marked and matches the imaged glyphs
skills.grounding: the folio image + the abbreviation reference

skills.intent: Evaluate each proposed trade for fairness using real player projections + league scoring rules
skills.grounding: player projection table + league scoring settings

skills.intent: Formulate each blend so notes are balanced, IFRA limits respected, and percentages sum to 100
skills.grounding: the ingredient IFRA-limit table + note pyramid rules

skills.intent: Identify the species in each recording; ID is plausible for the recording's region/season and cites acoustic features
skills.grounding: the spectrogram features + regional species list

skills.intent: Produce a ceremony checklist where every step is in canonical order and uses utensils appropriate to the chosen ceremony style
skills.grounding: the canonical ceremony procedure for the chosen style

skills.intent: Design each puzzle so it is solvable from provided clues alone, has exactly one solution, and chains to the next
Transcribe each dialect recording with IPA + orthography preserving non-standard features faithfully
skills.grounding: the audio + the dialect feature inventory

skills.intent: Validate each blazon: tincture rule (no colour-on-colour), grammar, and that it renders to the intended arms
skills.grounding: the heraldic grammar rules + the reference emblazon
